info.description:
MyMusik is an music player platform for offline music.

The API is object based. Each object has base methods: Insert, Update, Get, Get-Page, Erase.

Insert and Update always require a complete object. Every property must be present. Empty values are allowed.

For Insert the id is empty. The generated id is returned in the Location header.

Get requires only the object id. Get-Page uses a separate Filter object with Condition objects.

There are predefined filters available for example <ObjectName>By<PropertyName> lets you filter pages by any property.
Additional actions are defined per path and may vary. Some enum values are placeholders for future features.

The API is protected using access tokens. By default remote access is disabled. You can enable it in settings but do so carefully.
info.title: MyMusik API

post.summary: Adds multiple songs to the queue.

get.summary: Get the count of the queue.

Location.description: the location of the newly created resource

post.summary: Reposition items in the queue to start or end of queue.An action is defined in additionalValue and can be 'start' or 'end'.The items in ther queueitemlist are moved to the start or end of the queue

Location.description: the location of the newly created resource

post.summary: Reposition items in the queue.The id of the list represents the target item id to do an action on.An action is defined in additionalValue and can be 'Before', 'After' or 'Swap'.The items in ther queueitemlist are moved before, after or swapped with the target item.

Location.description: the location of the newly created resource

post.summary: Enqueues multiple songs to play immediately after the next track. This function allows users to add new songs to the queue without interrupting the currently playing song, ensuring the newly added songs are played right after the upcoming one.

Location.description: the location of the newly created resource

post.summary: Adds multiple songs to the front of the queue, making them the next to play. This action shifts the current queue back, allowing for an immediate update to the listening order with the new selections.

Location.description: the location of the newly created resource

post.summary: Removes multiple items from the queue.

Location.description: the location of the newly created resource

post.summary: Replaces the current queue with a new set of albums.

Location.description: the location of the newly created resource

post.summary: Replaces the current queue with a new set of songs.
Randomizes the order of songs in the current queue without changing its contents.

Location.description: the location of the newly created resource

post.summary: Skips items up to the selected item, removing the items before it from the queue.
